description: Forward economic release calendar - the desk ECO screen. Daily pulls the economic calendar (CPI, payrolls, PCE, ISM, GDP, jobless claims and the rest) with consensus, prior and post-release surprise. data/econ-calendar.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Forward economic release calendar - daily 11:00 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, ahead of the morning intelligence briefs so they can reference the day schedule.
